title: Learning Rule Sets Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential process of learning a set of classification rules from data, covering candidate generation, evaluation, pruning, and the formation of a final rule set.
relationships: Training Data is used to generate Candidate Rules
Candidate Rules are evaluated based on a heuristic
Evaluated Rules undergo Pruning to prevent overfitting
Pruned Rules are combined into a Final Rule Set
Final Rule Set is used to classify a New Instance
